# AGENTS.md — homebrew-mcp-upgrade

## Project Overview

Homebrew tap for mcp-upgrade. Universal upgrade tool for MCP servers across all AI coding clients.

- **Repo:** [GeiserX/homebrew-mcp-upgrade](https://github.com/GeiserX/homebrew-mcp-upgrade)
- **Language:** Ruby
- **License:** GPL-3.0

## Architecture

Standard Homebrew tap with formula definitions in `Formula/`.

### Key Files

- `Formula/mcp-upgrade.rb` — Homebrew formula

## Usage

```bash
brew tap GeiserX/homebrew-mcp-upgrade
brew install mcp-upgrade
```
